probes.name: search-registry-warm
probes.description: SearchIndex registry loaded on ApplicationBooted from #[Searchable] discovery.

probes.name: search-engines-reachable
probes.description: Ping every configured engine (Meilisearch, PG FTS, pgvector when enabled). Non-critical — unreachable engines degrade gracefully but service stays up. Moved from foundation on Wave 6 inception.

probes.name: search-sync-workers-fresh
probes.description: At least one SearchSyncJob reached terminal state within the last N hours. Warns when search-queue workers stalled fleet-wide.

probes.name: search-stalled-jobs
probes.description: No SyncJob in running with last_progress_at > stale threshold. Signals worker crash or stuck reindex.

probes.name: search-config-drift
probes.description: Compares live SearchIndex.config_hash values against compiled hashes. Non-zero drift = deploy shipped #[SearchField] changes without a follow-up reindex.

probes.name: search-index-document-count-drift
probes.description: Compares SearchIndex.document_count against source table row count. Divergence beyond threshold means indexing pipeline is losing writes.

probes.name: search-alias-consistency
probes.description: Verifies every SearchIndex.live_alias points at an existing physical index at the engine. Catches drift from manual engine-side ops.
